---
title: "Teaching"
---

# Teaching

## Teaching philosophy

My teaching is grounded in the belief that students learn best when they are supported through productive struggle, clear expectations, and meaningful opportunities to practice. I am especially interested in how students learn technical skills in the AI era while developing agency, persistence, transparency, and critical judgment.

## DATA-R155 redesign {#data-r155}

This section will describe my redesign of Introduction to R Programming, including the compressed course format, specifications grading, reproducible workflows, and AI-era learning activities.

## OER and course materials {#oer}

This section will highlight selected open educational resources and course materials created for students learning R, documentation workflows, and responsible AI use.

## SoTL project {#sotl}

This section will describe my Scholarship of Teaching and Learning project connected to the DATA-R155 redesign.

## Teaching certificates {#certificates}

This section will list selected teaching certificates and professional development activities.
